title: Sorted Squares
description: Given a non-empty array of integers nums, return the square of each element sorted in ascending order. For instance: Input=[-4,-1,0,2,8], Output=[0,1,4,16,64]
inputFormat: A non-empty array of integers nums
outputFormat: Sorted array with square of each element sorted ascendingly
sampleSolution:
def solve(nums):
    return sorted(x ** 2 for x in nums)
